babel-desc: Adds the #babel parser function to allow automated generation of a Babel userbox column with the ability to include custom templates
babel-template-params-category: Pages using babel with named parameters
babel-template-params-category-desc: The page passes a name=value parameter to the #babel parser function. The behaviour of these parameters [[phab:T327847|may change in the near future]].
communityconfiguration-babel-description: Customise the categories generated by the #babel parser function.
communityconfiguration-babel-babelcatego: Possible variable elements are: %code% (language code), %wikiname% (the name of the language in the wiki's content language), and %nativename% (the name of the language in its language). Leave blank to disable.
communityconfiguration-babel-babelmainca: Name of the main (non-level) category for each language to which all users of that language are added.
Accepts the same format as "Category names per language level" above.
communityconfiguration-babel-babeluseuse: Whether to use the user interface language for the header and footer message. If false (default), it will be in the page content language. This is because using the user interface language may fragment the parser cache.
